title: COMMUNICATION FROM THE LOS ANGELES HOUSING DEPARTMENT (LAHD) and RESOLUTION relative to removing the property at 10520 West Eastborne Avenue(Case No. 858268 ), Assessor I.D. No. 4326-033-017, from the Rent Escrow Account Program (REAP).

appearances.section: Items for which Public Hearings Have Not Been Held - (10 Votes Required for Consideration)
appearances.recommendation: APPROVE the LAHD report recommendation dated October 24, 2025, attached to the Council file, and ADOPT the accompanying RESOLUTION removing the property at 10520 West Eastborne Avenue(Case No. 858268), Assessor I.D. No. 4326-033-017, from the REAP. Fiscal Impact Statement: None submitted by the LAHD. Neither the City Administrative Officer nor the Chief Legislative Analyst has completed a financial analysis of this report. Community Impact Statement: None submitted. Report from Los Angeles Housing Department dated 10-24-25

attachments.text: Report from Los Angeles Housing Department dated 10-24-25
